title: Polymath capability vocabulary
description: Defines the closed set of SDLC capability domains workflows may declare in `requires.capabilities`, the set of providers that satisfy each domain, and the catalog plugin that ships each provider's adapter. Project configurations (`.polymath/capabilities.yaml`) are validated against this vocabulary so that workflows declare *what* they need (issue tracker, observability) and projects pick *which* provider (jira/linear/datadog/honeycomb). Adding a provider requires touching this file plus a thin adapter plugin — never adding a new top-level catalog entry.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. v1 is the only supported version.

capabilities.description: Closed map of capability name → spec. Workflows reference these names in `requires.capabilities`.

providers.description: Closed list of provider tokens valid for this capability. Each provider has a catalog plugin that supplies the adapter.

providerPlugins.description: Map of provider token → catalog plugin name that supplies the adapter. A project's `.polymath/capabilities.yaml` may override the plugin per provider; when unset, the runner looks up this map. Provider tokens that have no entry here are valid but must be supplied by the project (e.g. an in-house provider).
